Structural reorganization and citations?","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is a central expected responsibility when providing help on a research paper section to ensure any feedback promotes transparent reporting of limitations.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is a central expected responsibility in assisting with this section to prevent exaggeration of the proposed algorithm's contributions or bounds.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is a central expected responsibility to keep any assistance focused on the finite-sum convex optimization context described in the artifact.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is a central expected responsibility to consider potential misuse of the optimization algorithm in sensitive applications.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is a central expected responsibility to maintain accurate attribution to prior works and methods in the section."}}

parsed.clarification_question: What is the primary type of help you need with this section: 1. Writing polish and flow (grammar, conciseness), 2. Logical consistency and evidence alignment, 3. Novelty assessment and conceptual reframing, or 4. Structural reorganization and citations?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a central expected responsibility when providing help on a research paper section to ensure any feedback promotes transparent reporting of limitations.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is a central expected responsibility in assisting with this section to prevent exaggeration of the proposed algorithm's contributions or bounds.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is a central expected responsibility to keep any assistance focused on the finite-sum convex optimization context described in the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is a central expected responsibility to consider potential misuse of the optimization algorithm in sensitive applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is a central expected responsibility to maintain accurate attribution to prior works and methods in the section.
